authWizard.welcomeSignup: Enter your conference code first, choose how you participate, then create your account.
authWizard.welcomeLogin: Enter your conference code first, choose how you participate, then sign in.
authWizard.conferenceDescription: Enter the conference code from your organisers. Next you'll choose your role, then {mode}.
authWizard.conferenceCodeHelp: Whole-conference code (all committees). Spaces ignored; matching is case-insensitive.
authWizard.moveCircleRole: Move the circle to select the respective role.
authWizard.dragHint: Drag around the ring or use the arrows / arrow keys to change role.
authWizard.name: Name

roomGate.joinCommitteeDescription: Enter your committee code for this conference. You should already have entered the conference code on the previous screen.
roomGate.wrongConference: Wrong conference? Enter a different conference code
roomGate.openLatestCommitteeHelp: Opens the {code} session when it exists (after conference code SEAMUNI2027). Dais chairs must enter their committee codes above.
roomGate.setupConferenceSmtOnly: Set up a new conference (SMT only)
roomGate.setupConferenceHelp: Creates the conference code and the first committee code. Chairs manage committee codes from Chair -> Committee code after SMT creates the event.
roomGate.staffErrNoConferences: There are no conferences yet. SMT can set up a new conference below, or add rows in Supabase / run seed.sql.
roomGate.staffErrNotStaff: That shortcut is not available for your role.
roomGate.staffErrLatestSmtOnly: Opening the latest committee without codes is for SMT (secretariat) only. Dais chairs should enter the conference code and committee code.
roomGate.staffErrCreateForbidden: Only SMT (secretariat) can create a new conference event. Join with your codes or ask SMT.

server.eventCodeMin: Enter the conference code from your organisers (at least 4 characters).
server.eventCodeMissing: No conference matches that code. Check spelling with your organisers.
server.committeeCodeInvalid: Enter the 6-character committee code (letters and digits only, e.g. ECO741). Ask your chair or check SMT -> Room codes.
server.enterConferenceFirst: Enter your conference code first (go back to the previous step).
server.committeeCodeNoMatch: No committee matches that code for this event. Enter the conference code first, then the exact 6-character committee code (SMT -> Room codes or Supabase -> conferences).
server.committeeCodeMustBeSix: Committee code must be exactly 6 letters or digits (e.g. ECO741).
server.onlyStaffSetCode: Only chairs, SMT, and admins can set committee codes.
server.chairSeatOnly: You can only set the committee code for a session where you have a seat.
